subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
topic_title: Vocabulary Development: Home and Family Life
learning_objectives: Use the vocabulary correctly in context

sections.heading: Family Relationship Terms
sections.content: The note includes terms such as half-brother, grandchild, cousin, uncle, aunt, nephew, stepmother, relative, family, extended family, distant relative, and nuclear family.

sections.heading: Objects in the Home
sections.content: Home-related words include furniture, utensils, wardrobe, grinder, blender, and fridge.
